title: NanoBioConstruct
description: This web GUI tool prioritirize human proteins based on their adsorption onto a wide range of NPs surface using the UnitedAtom approach and Debye Theory and then applies a mapping from the coarse-grained approximation of the produced NP-protein configurations to atomistic ones in order to calculate with accuracy the NP's protein corona and calculate its adsorption energy
creator: https://ror.org/03wwn0z54
